name: openjam
description: Open-source jam.dev alternative: Chrome MV3 extension capturing console/network/errors/screenshots/device + rrweb session replay on one timeline, exported as a self-contained HTML bug report.

scripts.test: npm run build && bun test test/ && playwright test
scripts.test:snapshots: docker run --rm -e CI=1 -e HOME=/tmp -v "$PWD":/work -v /work/node_modules -w /work mcr.microsoft.com/playwright:v1.60.0-jammy bash -lc 'npm ci && npm run build && npx playwright test --update-snapshots'
scripts.package: npm run build && zip -r openjam.zip manifest.json LICENSE background.js event-kinds.js manifest.js issue-link.js popup.html popup.js viewer.html viewer.js renderer.js report-builder.js icons dist src/generated
